typecheck.note: TypeScript compilation and Vite build succeeded

lint.note: 2 pre-existing React best-practice errors in src/components/Heatmap.tsx (lines 493, 524). These errors are NOT in the cicd feature code (github-actions-workflows only touches .github/workflows/ and scraper/). Build passes despite lint errors.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Consider adding guidance on pre-existing lint errors: if lint fails due to issues in unrelated, pre-existing code (not in the feature being validated), workers should document this and proceed with feature review rather than treating it as a blocking failure.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Lint failed with 2 errors in Heatmap.tsx (Date.now() in render, setState in effect). These are React best-practice issues pre-existing in a component unrelated to the github-actions-workflows feature.

rejectedObservations.reason: Skill file existence is not something the scrutiny validator should enforce or fix — skill files are part of the agent configuration, not the codebase
uv is already used in the install and test commands (uv sync, uv run pytest) — no additional documentation needed
